ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image URL of the product */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Whether the product is featured on the site */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the product is active and available for sale */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly identifier for the product */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was last updated */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., merchant, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user about the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the product has been viewed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the view count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_purchases" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the product has been purchased */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the product */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the purchase count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_search_terms" (
  "search_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search term */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the search term */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term used to find the product */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of times the search term has been used */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the search term count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_search_terms_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was updated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., price, description) */,
  "update_value" TEXT /* Value of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_updates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)
